mapper.select: SELECT c.id AS id, c.post_id AS post_id, c.content AS content, c.created_at AS created_at, u.id AS author_id, u.display_name AS author_display_name FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC, c.id ASC

SELECT c.id AS id, c.post_id AS post_id, c.content AS content, c.created_at AS created_at, u.id AS author_id, u.display_name AS author_display_name FROM comments c JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
